{{Quote|Forgive me for saying so, Admiral, but this assignment is insulting! Even though the orders came from Imperial City, our ship shouldn't be used to pick up droids! The ''Decimator'' may not be as big or as powerful as an Imperial Star Destroyer, but we're still a combat unit, not a delivery service.|Pelvin, to [[Groot]]|<ref name="Missions 9" />}}
'''Pelvin''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]]. He was stationed aboard the [[Decimator (Star Destroyer)|''Decimator'']] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' {{1st}}

*''[[Star Wars Missions 12: The Vactooine Disaster]]''
